description: This repository provides very basic flask, [Streamlit](https://llama-index.streamlit.app/), and docker examples for the [llama_index](https://github.com/run-llama/llama_index) package.  If you need to quickly create a POC to impress your boss, start here!  If you are having trouble with dependencies, I dump my entire env into `requirements_full.txt`, but otherwise, use the base `requirements.txt`.  The basic demo includes the classic "Paul Graham Essay" from the original llama_index repo. Som...

code_examples.code:
conda create --name llama_index python=3.11
pip install -r requirements.txt
